title: schradera korthalsiana subsp. robusta
intro: Schradera korthalsiana subsp. robusta, also known as the robust Schradera, is a plant species that belongs to the Rubiaceae family. It is a shrub native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia, and its medicinal properties have been utilized by local communities for centuries. The robust Schradera has been found to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to alleviate various health issues such as fever, digestive problems, and skin infections. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, and is also used in the form of a poultice or paste to treat various health conditions.
